title: scutellaria ovata subsp. versicolor
intro: Scutellaria ovata subsp. versicolor, also known as the variegated skullcap, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family, characterized by its unique variegated leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria ovata subsp. versicolor include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Scutellaria ovata subsp. versicolor can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
